cost_name: Grid Connection — Brownfield (Reuse Existing Infrastructure) — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: Based on HGHH/ Moorburg model: reuse existing 380 kV connection from decommissioned coal plant. Includes minor switchgear upgrades and protection system reconfiguration. Does NOT include new transformer (existing unit reused).

confidence.rationale: HGHH project provides qualitative validation of brownfield grid reuse cost savings. HGHH explicitly cited 380 kV reuse as a key cost advantage. Range reflects site-specific condition of existing equipment.

primary_drivers: Condition of existing switchgear and protection
Grid code compliance upgrades (new vs legacy standards)
exclusions: Major transformer replacement (if existing unit fails condition assessment)
New transmission line (if existing line is decommissioned)

sources.title: HGHH (GA-PR-004) — Moorburg coal plant 380 kV connection reuse
sources.author: Luxcara / Hamburger Energiewerke
